title: The GLP-1 stock nobody is pricing in isn’t a drugmaker
full_text: Scott Galloway and Ed Elson laid out the math on Prof G Markets and it should make every fast food shareholder uneasy: roughly 30 million Americans, about 1 in 8 US adults, are now on GLP-1s, and the drugs are reducing fast food’s addressable market by an estimated 27-30%. This is structural, not cyclical: appetite, ... The GLP-1 stock nobody is pricing in isn’t a drugmaker
